summary: The protagonist battles a powerful boss named Dorma of the Blood Clan by summoning the Tyrant Caruso to wear the enemy down. After the summon expires, the protagonist uses an array of powerful buffs and debuffs to finish the fight alone. Upon defeating the boss and leveling up, the protagonist celebrates with their team before turning their attention to a massive tombstone that needs to be destroyed.
key_moments: The protagonist summons Tyrant Caruso to weaken the boss.
The protagonist applies multiple high-level buffs and the 'Twilight's Reenactment' debuff to defeat the weakened Dorma.
The boss is defeated, triggering a level-up and the team's preparation to destroy a mysterious giant tombstone.
